formdata.description: Mandatory. The search query terms are provided using the q parameter. Exact or partial exact match is provided using double quotes. For example: The authentic versions of the "relevant acts" is looking for The AND authentic AND versions AND of AND the AND relevant IMMEDIATELY FOLLOWED BY acts

Specifies the language of the user. This parameter is used to influence the relevancy of search results: search results in the same language as the host language may be promoted. The parameter must be provided in uppercase.
Specifies the filter on collection. This parameter is repeatable, but could not be provided more than 1024 times. This parameter must be provided in lowercase.
Specifies the page size of the search result. A maximum of 50 items per page are allowed.
Specifies the page number to return, using zero based numbering.

Specifies the sorting of the search results. The parameter is composed of the field with an optional order. If the order is specified than the field as to be followed by a comma and then the order. If the order is not specified desc is used by default for relevancy and date, while asc is used by default for title and author and originalAuthor. The parameter must be provided in lowercase.

formdata.value: one of: eurovoc_subject, domain, relation, language, title, description, author, originalAuthor, personalAuthor, collection, publicationDate, format, doi, isbn, issn, catalogue_number, celex, ecli, eli, oj, thumbnail, study, predecessor, successor, edition
formdata.description: Specifies the list of fields to be fetched. This parameter must be provided in lowercase.

formdata.value: one of: title, description, author, originalAuthor, eurovoc_subject
formdata.description: Specifies the list of field to highlight. This parameter must be provided in lowercase.
Specifies the list of facet to be generated. The parameter is case sensitive.
Specifies the size of the author facet. If the value is set to 0, all values are returned.
Specifies the size of the authorHierarchy facet. If the value is set to 0, all values are returned.
Specifies the size of the collection facet. If the value is set to 0, all values are returned.
Specifies the size of the EUROVOC subject facet. If the value is set to 0, all values are returned.
Specifies the size of the document format facet. If the value is set to 0, all values are returned.
Specifies the size of the language facet. If the value is set to 0, all values are returned.
Specifies the size of the publication date year facet. If the value is set to 0, all values are returned.
Specifies the size of the study facet. If the value is set to 0, all values are returned.

Specifies the filter on current author and original author, using NAL codes. Check the chapter Named authority Lists (NAL) support. This parameter is repeatable, and could not be provided more than 1024 times. This parameter is case-sensitive.

Specifies the filter on current author hiearchy, using NAL codes. Check the chapter Named authority Lists (NAL) support. This parameter is repeatable, and could not be provided more than 1024 times. This parameter is case-sensitive.

Specifies the filter on EUROVOC subject, using NAL codes. Check the chapter Named authority Lists (NAL) support. This parameter is repeatable, and could not be provided more than 1024 times. This parameter is case-sensitive.
Specifies the filter on document format, using uppercase values. This parameter is repeatable, and could not be provided more than 1024 times. The parameter must be provided in uppercase.

formdata.value: one of: ARA, AZE, BOS, BUL, CAT, CES, CYM, DAN, DEU, ELL, ENG, EST, EUS, FAS, FIN, FRA, GLE, HEB, HIN, HRV, HUN, HYE, ISL, ITA, JPN, KAT, KHM, KOR, KUR, LAV, LIT, LTZ, MKD, MLT, MOL, NLD, NOR, POL, POR, PUS, RON, RUS, SIN, SLK, SLV, SOM, SPA, SQI, SRP, SWA, SWE, TAM, TIR, TUR, UKR, URD, VIE, ZHO
formdata.description: Specifies the filter on language using ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code format. This parameter is repeatable, and could not be provided more than 1024 times. The parameter must be provided in uppercase.
Specifies the filter on publication date year, using YYYY format. This parameter is repeatable, and could not be provided more than 1024 times.
Specifies the filter on study. This parameter is repeatable, and could not be provided more than 1024 times. This parameter is case-sensitive.

Specifies the micro search term. In addition to the mandatory term specified using the q parameter, addtionnal term could be provided using micro search. An AND operator is performed between the q term, and the various micro search values. Example: (q: voyager AND ((q.micr: europe) OR (q.micr: spain))) Exact or partial exact match is provided using double quotes. For example: The authentic versions of the "relevant acts" is looking for The AND authentic AND versions AND of AND the AND relevant IMMEDIATELY FOLLOWED BY acts This parameter is repeatable, but could not be provided more than 1024 times.
